---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for NEURON OS.
title: 'feat: [Short description of feature]'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

**Describe the Solution**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe Alternatives Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Cinematic / Futuristic Layout (UI suggestions)**
If this is a UI feature, describe the sci-fi HUD or visualization design element to implement (e.g. glowing rings, canvas particles).

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, drawings, or mockups here.
